assertions.expectation: Explains that spot VMs can be preempted at any time, which interacts with the upgrade drain process
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states spot VMs can be preempted during upgrade process and that node draining may trigger spot interruptions before workloads can be safely moved

assertions.expectation: Notes that spot node pools may already have workloads designed for interruption (good for upgrades)
assertions.reason: Response mentions spot instance challenges but doesn't explicitly note that workloads running on spot pools are typically already designed to handle interruptions, making them well-suited for upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends higher maxSurge for spot pools since the workloads should already be fault-tolerant
assertions.reason: Response shows maxSurge: 1 in examples and doesn't specifically recommend higher maxSurge values for spot pools based on their fault-tolerant nature

assertions.expectation: Advises setting maxUnavailable >0 for spot pools since workloads are already preemption-tolerant
assertions.reason: Response shows maxUnavailable: 0 in configuration examples and doesn't advise setting maxUnavailable >0 for spot pools

assertions.expectation: Mentions that spot VM availability may affect surge node creation (not guaranteed to get spot instances)
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'New spot instances for v1.32 nodes might not be available in your preferred zones/types' and discusses capacity availability issues

assertions.expectation: Recommends having PDBs even for spot workloads to ensure orderly drain during upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes a complete PodDisruptionBudget YAML example and explicitly recommends ensuring proper PDBs as a best practice

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for configuring surge settings on the spot pool
assertions.reason: Response provides gcloud container node-pools update command with --max-surge and --max-unavailable flags for configuring surge settings

assertions.expectation: Suggests upgrading spot pools before on-demand pools since they're lower risk
assertions.reason: Response doesn't suggest prioritizing spot pools for upgrades or mention that they're lower risk compared to on-demand pools
